steps.title: Focus on one species
steps.content: The sentence needs an example of within-species variation, meaning a change in the number of individuals within a single species over time. A comparison between two different species would show between-species variation, not the pattern the researchers described.

steps.title: Use the accurate range
steps.content: Choice A names one species but misreads the striated rockskipper's highest months. Choice C gives only one high point for the Cocos frillgoby, so it does not show variation across time. Choice D compares striated rockskippers with Indo-Pacific sergeants instead of tracking one population's change. The answer is B.
